channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Majority of Americans oppose Trump’s Iran strikes, per new polling  Politico

  3. Opinion | How Trump's polling could impact the Iran War  MS NOW
  4. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  5. What is Trump's approval rating? Iran strikes controversial in polls  USA Today

item.title: U.S., Israel's war with Iran widens. And, Texas primaries test Latino support for GOP - NPR
item.description:
1. U.S., Israel's war with Iran widens. And, Texas primaries test Latino support for GOP  NPR
  2. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  3. War in Iran jolts final day of campaigning in Texas primary  AP News
  4. Texas Trump supporters react to US strikes on Iran  BBC

item.title: 9,000 pages of comments slam Trump White House ballroom plan - Axios
item.description:
1. 9,000 pages of comments slam Trump White House ballroom plan  Axios
  2. Panel reviewing Trump ballroom plans will also hear from commenters skeptical of project  CBS News
  3. Federal judge allows Trump’s $400M White House ballroom to move forward  Fox Business
